sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40222" key="e)pimhxa/nhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιμηχᾰ´ν-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n40222.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">device, contrivance</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐξ -ήσεως</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on purpose, artificially</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:153" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.153</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
